open_questions: The December 8, 2025 hearing page description reads 'Reilly Appeal of Sicular Environmental Consulting Proposal to Prepare a Section 15183 Checklist,' which appears mismatched with the Souang housing-project attachments listed on the same page. Keep that description mismatch as a source-level inconsistency rather than resolving it away.

The current split isolates the May 14, 2025 Housing Compliance Review determination, but it does not yet prove whether the Vesting Tentative Map and Tree Removal components were resolved in the same decision or in separate determinations.

The March 10, 2026 Board of Supervisors hearing is visible, but this slice does not yet promote a final Board decision because only the hearing-level materials are presently in view, not a clearly signed final outcome document.
